title: SynchroNet: Extending User Automation and Amazon WorkSpaces Provisioning with AWS Step Functions

description:
Learn more about This Is My Architecture at - https://amzn.to/2KegiTc. 
A common denominator across enterprise customers is a directory of users and a need to automate their resource provisioning at scale. Learn how SynchroNet uses a lightweight, serverless, event-driven architecture to ensure that the right user personas get the right workspace resources every time by automating Amazon Workspaces provisioning. 

Host: Todd Escalona, GSI Solutions Architect Evangelist, AWS
Customer: Mike Hapner, Chief Technology Officer, SynchroNet

Subscribe:
